nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Red-throated sunbird
nodes.summary: Red-throated sunbird（Anthreptes rhodolaemus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-throated sunbird。

nodes.name: Red-throated sunbird
nodes.summary: The red-throated sunbird (Anthreptes rhodolaemus) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, and Thailand. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
